name: inspectres-vtt
description: InSpectres paranormal investigation RPG system for Foundry VTT

scripts.build: npm run pack && vite build --config vite.config.ts
scripts.prod: npm run pack && vite build --config vite.config.prod.ts
scripts.pack: npm run pack:actors && npm run pack:macros
scripts.pack:actors: fvtt package pack --id inspectres --type System -n actors --in packs/actors --out packs-compiled
scripts.pack:macros: fvtt package pack --id inspectres --type System -n macros --in packs/macros --out packs-compiled
